title: Debris from aerial interception strikes building in Dubai's Marina
summary_full: Debris from an aerial interception struck a building in Dubai Marina, authorities confirmed Saturday. No fire or injuries were reported following the incident, which occurred amid ongoing regional conflict. This follows earlier attacks in the UAE, including one at a gas facility and a fire on a Kuwaiti oil tanker.
